title: Size Stealer
description: Kill to Grow! Start your journey as a tiny 0.25x scale player and steal the size of your enemies. Grow up to 10x your normal size with every kill! Perfect for survival challenges. (Requires Pehkui).
body:
📏 Size Stealer: The Ultimate Growth Challenge
Have you ever felt too small for this blocky world? Well, now you literally are!

Size Stealer is a unique progression mod for Fabric 1.20.1 that turns every combat encounter into a literal growth opportunity. You start your journey as a tiny, vulnerable creature and must fight your way up to become a towering giant.

🧬 How It Works:
The Tiny Beginning: Upon entering the world, your scale is set to 0.25x. You are smaller than a grass block, making the world look massive and dangerous.

Kill to Grow: Every time you defeat a mob (from a simple chicken to the Wither), you "steal" a bit of its essence, increasing your scale by +0.1.

No Limits (Almost): Keep hunting to grow larger and larger. You can reach up to 10x your original size, allowing you to walk over hills and look down upon trees.

✨ Key Features:
🚀 Smooth Scaling: Watch yourself grow in real-time thanks to the powerful Pehkui engine.

🎮 Dynamic Gameplay: Being small makes you faster but harder to reach blocks. Being a giant makes you a powerhouse but watch your head in caves!

🎬 Content Creator Ready: This mod is perfect for "100 Days" challenges, "Can I beat Minecraft as a Giant?" videos, and fun multiplayer sessions.

🛠️ Technical Requirements:
To make this mod work, you MUST install the following dependencies:

Fabric API — The core library for Fabric mods.

Pehkui — The engine that handles all the scaling magic.

📦 Installation:
Install Fabric Loader for 1.20.1.

Download Size Stealer, Fabric API, and Pehkui.

Drop all three .jar files into your mods folder.

Launch the game and start your growth!
